mapper.select: SELECT GROUP_CODE, COMMON_CODE, CODE_NAME, USE_YN, DEL_YN, SORT_ORDER, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_AT FROM TB_COMMON_CODE WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMMON_CODE ( GROUP_CODE, COMMON_CODE, CODE_NAME, USE_YN, DEL_YN, SORT_ORDER, DESCRIPTION, CREATED_AT, CREATED_BY ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{commonCode}, #{codeName}, #{useYn}, #{delYn}, #{sortOrder}, #{description}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_COMMON_CODE SET CODE_NAME = #{codeName}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy} WHERE GROUP_CODE = #{groupCode} AND COMMON_CODE = #{commonCode}
